description_long: This is a compact, freestanding sink unit with a rectangular black countertop and integrated backsplash. The countertop features a double-basin design with a metallic faucet and two handles, all set into a glossy, dark surface. The base cabinet is constructed from wood with a striped pattern on the sides and two vertically-oriented, light-colored doors on the front. The rear and side views reveal the cabinet's boxy structure and the horizontal wood grain pattern, while the front view highlights the functional access doors. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for installation in urban environments such as public restrooms, garages, or utility rooms. The materials and finish suggest durability and ease of cleaning.
description: A modern, freestanding double-basin sink with a black countertop, metallic faucet, and striped wood cabinet base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-basin sink, metallic faucet, and two light-colored cabinet doors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the depth of the cabinet and the protruding faucet.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the horizontal striped wood pattern and the flat back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cabinet's depth and faucet profile.
